    • Help translate

The browser you’re using is unsupported, and the website may not work correctly for you. It’s recommended that you upgrade to a recent version of Firefox, Safari, Edge, or any Chrome-based browser. If that’s not possible, you can try enabling legacy browser mode.

This is a MusicBrainz development server. Return to musicbrainz.org.

Add event

For more information, check the documentation.

Event details

Add "@ " at line start to indicate artists, "* " for a work/song, "# " for additional info (such as "Encore"). [mbid|name] allows linking to artists and works.

If needed, the characters "[", "]", and "&" can be escaped using the HTML entities "&lsqb;", "&rsqb;", and "&amp;" respectively.

Date period

Dates are in the format YYYY-MM-DD. Partial dates such as YYYY-MM or just YYYY are OK, or you can omit the date entirely.

--
--

Loading...

External links

Loading...

Edit note

Entering an edit note that describes where you got your information is highly recommended. Not only does it make your sources clear (both now and to users who see the edit years later), but it can also encourage other users to vote on the edit — thus making it get applied faster.

Even just providing a URL or two is helpful! For more suggestions, see our guide for writing good edit notes.
